From you and i to us

Memories we'll remember forever

Our First Adventure

Remember that sunny afternoon when we decided to explore the hidden café downtown? Your smile that day is something I'll never forget.

1 of 4

Every moment with you is a memory I cherish. Here's to more beautiful moments ahead.

⟡

This birthday marks another year of growth, joy, and beautiful moments. I hope your day is filled with everything that makes you smile.

With all my love,

fai ✦

Thank you for being you. Happy Birthday.
